resolutions.B1_qualname_mismatch: Added scope stack tracking to RuleBase._dispatch() and visit_ClassDef(). Rules use self._current_qualname instead of enclosing_func.name. Added class-method test case.
resolutions.B2_pass1_error_handling: Wrapped discovery+taint in try/except with fallback to empty taint map. Added test for discover_annotations failure.
resolutions.B3_task6_ordering: Added explicit DEPENDENCY note requiring Tasks 3+4+5 committed before baseline capture.

warnings_addressed.W1_mypy_type: Fixed _load_manifest return type to WardlineManifest | None
warnings_addressed.W2_module_imports: Changed all matrix imports to module-level
warnings_addressed.W4_orphaned_taint_state: Noted for removal from rule constructors
warnings_addressed.W5_mixed_raw: Added MIXED_RAW to _ACTIVE_TAINTS with rationale comment
warnings_addressed.W6_existing_tests: Implementer must audit existing rule tests during Tasks 4-5

warnings_deferred.W7_stale_integration_test: test_scan_engine_integration.py comment update — minor, can be done during execution
